user.title: Connect to Generac PWRview
user.description: Choose how you want to connect to your PWRview device.

menu_options.cloud: Cloud API (auto-discovers device, supports local fallback)
menu_options.local: Local only (connect directly to device on your network)

cloud.title: Cloud API credentials
cloud.description: Enter your Generac/Neurio API credentials. You can find these in your account settings at my.neur.io.

data_description.api_key: Your API key from the Generac/Neurio account settings.
data_description.api_secret: Your API secret from the Generac/Neurio account settings.

local.title: Local device setup
local.description: Enter your PWRview device details. The serial number is printed on the dongle and the IP address can be found in your router's DHCP client list.

data_description.host: The IP address of your PWRview device on your local network.
data_description.serial_number: The serial number printed on your PWRview dongle.

local_failed.title: Local connection failed
local_failed.description: Could not reach your PWRview device at `{host}`. Check that Home Assistant can access your local network. Enable the checkbox below to use cloud polling instead, or leave it unchecked to retry the local connection.

data_description.use_cloud: If enabled, Home Assistant will poll the Generac cloud API instead of your local device. This uses more bandwidth but works if your device is not accessible locally.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Generac PWRview API
error.no_sensors: No PWRview devices found for this account
error.local_connection_failed: Could not connect to device. Check the IP address and that the device is online.

abort.already_configured: This PWRview device is already configured
